docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-11-2016 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON NOV-18-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT AND [PROPOSED] CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DIGITAL GADGETS, LLC IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND THE SETTLEMENT IS IN COMPLIANCE WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF PROPOSITION 65. WRITTEN ORDER AND JUDGMENT ARE SIGNED AND FILED IN OPEN COURT. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-05-2016 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant Digital Gadgets, Llc
Off Calendar Jul-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Christopher F. Tuttle of The Chanler Group (510-848-8880) appears for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant Digital Gadgets, LLC is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement is in compliance with the requirements of Proposition 65. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-24-2016 Continued To Aug-08-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
